title: Tifuly 12 PCS Artificial Roses, 19.68'' Single Long Stem Fake Rose Silk Bridal Wedding Bouquet Realistic Flower for Home Garden Party Hotel Office Decor(Blossom Roses,Burgundy)
features: 【Size】Total height approx 1.64 ft/ 50cm, rose flower head 3.15inch/ 8cm in diameter.
【Package】1 Package included: 12 PCS artificial roses in bulk.(the vase is not included).

【Material】Silk( real touch ) flowers and leaves; metal wire as skeleton is wrapped by plastic. long stem can be trimmed or bent, non-toxic color won't fade over time, perfect choice for pollen allergic people.

【Popular Decoration】Single stem roses are very popular in flower arrangements: DIY art-works. accesories. lapel boutonnieres. gift packages etc. home decor:bedroom, kitchen, garden, table etc. creat a romantic atmosphere : engagement. wedding ceremony. Valentine’s Day. Anniversary, etc. welcome to our shop products page to find more flowers, add them to your centerpieces or bouquets.

【Customer Service】Tifuly provides 100% money back service and 3 months warranty, any question or suggestion please feel free to contact with us from Amazon message center, we'll reply you within 12 hours.
description: Product Description Welcome to share your decoration experience with Tifuly. Color: Black/ Red/ Burgundy/ Pink/ Cream White/ Champagne/ Purple/ Mysterious Blue/ Ginger Yellow/ Light Pink ( due to the different computer monitors, the pictures and objects may have some slight differences,please refer to the real subject. ) Please Note: 1.There maybe some marks on the leaves, it's not burn mark, it's a retro crafts makes roses are suitable for any season. 2.They may pressed in the shipment, but it won't effect the quality.please fume them with vapour and arrange the flowers and leaves after received them. Size: Height approx 19.68 inch/ 50 cm, flower 3.15 inch/ 8 cm in diamater. Package: 12 pcs * Single Stem Artificial Roses. Material: Silk flowers and leaves, metal wire as skeleton is wrapped by plastic, flower heads are glued firmly to the stems. Easy to make Gifts and DIY floral arrangements: Who wouldn't like to receive such exquisite flowers? At the bottom, you can put some sweets. lipstick. necklace which she likes, sprinkle some sequins on the top of flowers, and spray light perfume, she must be happy when she opened this such fully hearted gift. Size Package Material DIY Flower Box Colors: Red Burgundy Black Yellow Blue Purple Popular with: Centerpieces Wedding Decoration Flower Box Home Decoration Party Decoration Interior Designers Restaurant Decoration Florists DIY Floral arrangement etc. Advantages: Single stem roses are normally used in flower arrangements. very popular in floral supply, match them with lily. tulips or other flowers, get a new centerpieces. High quality and natural-looking, non-toxic and won't fade under the sun. 12 Pcs single stem roses will meet your daily use needs, order them now, bring more beauty to your home.
